title: Disallow `.bind()` and arrow functions in JSX props
description: Disallow `.bind()` and arrow functions in JSX propsAnalyze your codeintentionality-efficientmaintainabilityCode SmellreactjsxperformanceWhy is this an issue?More InfoUsingFunction.prototype.bindand arrows functions as attributes will negatively impact performance in React. Each time the parent is rendered, the function will be re-created and trigger a render of the component causing excessive renders and more memory use. Wrapping the function in auseCallbackhook will avoid additional renders.
recommendation: Refactor to eliminate the flagged pattern.

checks.message: Avoid using bind() in JSX props
Avoid arrow functions in JSX props
